headline: Madison Dividend Income Fund is Bullish on ExxonMobil Holdings Corporation (XOM)
summary: Madison Dividend Income Fund, managed by Madison Funds, released its Q2 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Fund aims to generate income and capital appreciation from a high-quality, high-dividend portfolio. The Fund (class I) returned +1.8% in the second quarter, which compared to the S&P 500 Index, Russell […]

headline: Oil Prices Hit $95 a Barrel as Rubio Says Iran ‘Not Serious’ About Talks
summary: Renewed U.S. strikes on Iran have sent oil prices higher on Wednesday, with shares in energy companies like ExxonMobil gaining as Secretary of State Marco Rubio said Iran was “not serious” about peace talks.

headline: Rand Paul Slams $1.5 Trillion Pentagon Ask: The Biggest Threat to America Isn't Iran, It's the Debt

headline: OXY, BATL, USO, UCO Stocks Surge Premarket As Brent Breaks Above $94 A Barrel
summary: Brent crude futures expiring in September rose to $94.25 per barrel at the time of writing, while WTI crude futures expiring in September were at $87.54 per barrel.

headline: ExxonMobil Holdings (XOM) Could Be 11% Undervalued Following Earnings Optimism
summary: ExxonMobil Holdings (XOM) is drawing fresh attention as investors position ahead of its second quarter 2026 earnings release, with recent share gains coinciding with firm crude prices and ongoing geopolitical tension in the Middle East. See our latest analysis for ExxonMobil Holdings. The recent 2.26% 1 day share price return and 10.09% 30 day share price return suggest momentum has been building in ExxonMobil Holdings, while the 44.23% 1 year total shareholder return highlights how sustained...
